notes: Official Ministerio de Transportes (DGC) PDF. Direct curl with only User-Agent returned HTTP 403 (WAF 'Página web bloqueada' page, 2970 bytes) as warned in the audit; bypassed by adding browser headers including Referer: https://www.transportes.gob.es/ plus Accept/Accept-Language. Validated ok=true, 549 pages (~547 pp expected). Content confirmed: cover 'GUÍA DE NUDOS VIARIOS — DICIEMBRE 2012' and ToC (3.3 Velocidad, 4.7 Visibilidad, 5 Morfología de los nudos, intersecciones). Completes at-grade-intersection + interchange design coverage for ESP.
